pageContext.name: Mudhorn Clan of Two Pendant
pageContext.description: Sculpted in solid sterling silver, The Mandalorian's Din Djarin's Mudhorn clan signet is reversible – choose to wear the engraved motto 'Clan of Two' facing outward for all to see or hidden privately against the body. Sleek and simple, with antiquing to emphasize contrast, the pendant hangs from a heavy adjustable 24-inch sterling silver curb chain.  This Star Wars X RockLove jewelry design is Limited Edition. Every Star Wars X RockLove piece arrives in a signature Star Wars X RockLove Collector's Box, with an embossed exterior and metallic silkscreened art inside. The two fitted pieces to stack, with the jewelry mounted in a theatrical widescreen proscenium, compelling addition to any display case.  Star Wars fans don't miss your chance to add this beautiful piece of jewelry to your collection!
